query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN marketingConsent = 1 OR marketingConsent = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_true,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marketingConsent = 0 OR marketingConsent = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_false,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marketingConsent IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_null,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM sports_day_registrations;
